intro: A construction golem has gone haywire on the site, smashing scaffolding and scattering workers. The foreman flags you down and offers good pay to shut it down.
title: The Foreman's Job
description: A rampaging construction golem is tearing up the site. Take the foreman's job and bring it down - a powerful multi-bar boss, several levels above your strongest Pokemon - for a guaranteed high-tier reward and a Relic. Or clock out and leave.

1.label: Take the job
1.tooltip:
(+) Win for a guaranteed high-tier reward + a Relic
(?) A tough multi-bar boss, above your level
1.selected: You roll up your sleeves as the golem turns its attention to you!

2.label: Clock out
2.selected: You leave the foreman to find someone else for the job.
